knowledgePoints.name: 词根spect/spect=look看，衍生词
knowledgePoints.explanation: 词根spect/spect=look看，衍生词：respect尊重、inspect检查、spectacular壮观的、prospect前景、retrospect回顾

knowledgePoints.name: 词根ced/cess=go走，衍生词
knowledgePoints.explanation: 词根ced/cess=go走，衍生词：proceed前进、exceed超越、recess休息、success成功、access访问

knowledgePoints.name: 词根duce/duct=lead引导，衍生词
knowledgePoints.explanation: 词根duce/duct=lead引导，衍生词：produce生产、reduce减少、introduce介绍、conduct导体、deduce推断

knowledgePoints.name: 前缀con/com表示共同、在一起；前缀dis/dif表示不...
knowledgePoints.explanation: 前缀con/com表示共同、在一起；前缀dis/dif表示不、分离；前缀pre表示预先；前缀pro表示向前

knowledgePoints.name: 动词+介词
knowledgePoints.explanation: 动词+介词：look forward to doing期待、contribute to贡献、adapt to适应、respond to响应、attach to附属于

knowledgePoints.name: 动词+副词
knowledgePoints.explanation: 动词+副词：break up分手、put off推迟、turn down拒绝、carry out执行、figure out想出

knowledgePoints.name: be + 形容词 + about
knowledgePoints.explanation: be + 形容词 + about：be concerned about关心、be curious about好奇、be optimistic about乐观、be skeptical about怀疑

knowledgePoints.name: come+介词/副词
knowledgePoints.explanation: come+介词/副词：come across偶遇、come up with提出、come true实现、come about发生、come along出现

knowledgePoints.name: affect vs effect
knowledgePoints.explanation: affect vs effect：affect是动词（影响），effect是名词（效果）或动词（实现）；impact vs influence：impact较正式，influence可指潜移默化的影响

knowledgePoints.name: award vs reward
knowledgePoints.explanation: award vs reward：award强调授予行为，reward强调回报；prize多指比赛奖品；scholarship是奖学金

knowledgePoints.name: economic vs economical
knowledgePoints.explanation: economic vs economical：economic经济学的，economical节约的；historic vs historical：historic重要的历史性的，historical历史的（学术研究用）

knowledgePoints.name: sensitive vs sensible
knowledgePoints.explanation: sensitive vs sensible：sensitive敏感的（对刺激反应），sensible明智的（判断合理）；sensible vs sensitive要注意区分

knowledgePoints.name: however vs nevertheless
knowledgePoints.explanation: however vs nevertheless：however更口语化，可放句首句中句尾用逗号隔开；nevertheless较正式，多放句中

knowledgePoints.name: therefore vs hence
knowledgePoints.explanation: therefore vs hence：therefore常用于结论，hence后可接名词（hence the delay）也可接句子

knowledgePoints.name: unless vs if not
knowledgePoints.explanation: unless vs if not：unless在特定情况下等于if...not，但unless不能用虚拟语气；if not可引导虚拟条件句

knowledgePoints.name: although vs while
knowledgePoints.explanation: although vs while：although后接完整句子，while可表示对比（Whereas）；though更口语，although更书面

knowledgePoints.name: much/very/quite/rather+比较级
knowledgePoints.explanation: much/very/quite/rather+比较级：much better、quite better（不说very better）；very much appreciate、quite appreciate

knowledgePoints.name: likely/probably/perhaps/perhap...
knowledgePoints.explanation: likely/probably/perhaps/perhapsly：likely是形容词（It's likely that...），probably是副词，perhaps比probably更不确定

knowledgePoints.name: another/few more/several more
knowledgePoints.explanation: another/few more/several more：another three days、a few more minutes、several more attempts

knowledgePoints.name: the other day vs another day
knowledgePoints.explanation: the other day vs another day：the other day几天前（过去）；another day某一天（将来/不确定）；other days其他日子

knowledgePoints.name: expect vs anticipate vs hope
knowledgePoints.explanation: expect vs anticipate vs hope：expect期待（认为会发生）、anticipate预料（提前准备）、hope希望（愿愿望）

knowledgePoints.name: discover vs invent vs create
knowledgePoints.explanation: discover vs invent vs create：discover发现（已存在）、invent发明（创造新事物）、create创造（从无到有）

knowledgePoints.name: process vs procedure vs progre...
knowledgePoints.explanation: process vs procedure vs progress：process过程（方法步骤）、procedure程序（正式步骤）、progress进步（向前发展）

knowledgePoints.name: efficient vs effective
knowledgePoints.explanation: efficient vs effective：efficient高效的（省资源）、effective有效的（达到目的）

knowledgePoints.name: 表示“然而”
knowledgePoints.explanation: 表示“然而”：however、nevertheless、nonetheless、whereas、while；语气和正式程度不同

knowledgePoints.name: 表示“因此”
knowledgePoints.explanation: 表示“因此”：therefore、hence、thus、accordingly、consequently；hence后可接名词短语

knowledgePoints.name: 表示“此外”
knowledgePoints.explanation: 表示“此外”：moreover、furthermore、in addition、additionally、besides

knowledgePoints.name: 表示“尽管”
knowledgePoints.explanation: 表示“尽管”：despite、although、though、even though、in spite of；despite后接名词，although后接从句

knowledgePoints.name: put相关短语
knowledgePoints.explanation: put相关短语：put off推迟、put up举起/搭建、put down放下/记下、put forward提出、put out熄灭/出版

knowledgePoints.name: turn相关短语
knowledgePoints.explanation: turn相关短语：turn down调低/拒绝、turn up出现/调高、turn out证明是/生产、turn into变成、turn over翻转/仔细考虑

knowledgePoints.name: make相关短语
knowledgePoints.explanation: make相关短语：make up编造/化妆/组成、make sense有意义、make progress取得进步、make decision做决定、make difference起作用

knowledgePoints.name: take相关短语
knowledgePoints.explanation: take相关短语：take off起飞/脱下、take up开始从事/占据、take in吸收/欺骗、take on承担、take over接管

knowledgePoints.name: in相关
knowledgePoints.explanation: in相关：in advance预先、in addition此外、in detail详细地、in general通常、in favor of支持

knowledgePoints.name: on相关
knowledgePoints.explanation: on相关：on behalf of代表、on purpose故意、on the spot当场、on the contrary相反、on average平均

knowledgePoints.name: at相关
knowledgePoints.explanation: at相关：at stake危在旦夕、at length详细地/最后、at random随机地、at risk处于危险中、at best最多

knowledgePoints.name: with相关
knowledgePoints.explanation: with相关：with respect to关于、with regard to关于、with regard to关于、with respect to关于、with the purpose of为了

knowledgePoints.name: 名词+介词
knowledgePoints.explanation: 名词+介词：access to访问、evidence of证据、response to回应、need for需要、basis for基础

knowledgePoints.name: 形容词+介词
knowledgePoints.explanation: 形容词+介词：conscious of意识到、aware of知道、capable of能够、independent of独立于、patient with耐心

knowledgePoints.name: 动词+名词
knowledgePoints.explanation: 动词+名词：make contribution贡献、take effect生效、play role发挥作用、take advantage of利用、pay attention to注意

knowledgePoints.name: 常见错误搭配
knowledgePoints.explanation: 常见错误搭配：不能说fast speed应该说high speed；不能说very tall应该说quite tall或rather tall
